hero.title: Rent & Manage with
hero.description: Streamline your property management with Tanaka's comprehensive platform. From tenant screening to rent collection, we've got you covered.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your properties efficiently

propertyManagement.title: Property Management
propertyManagement.description: Manage multiple properties with ease. Track units, tenants, and maintenance all in one place.

tenantManagement.title: Tenant Management
tenantManagement.description: Keep detailed tenant records, track lease agreements, and manage communications effortlessly.

leaseTracking.title: Lease Tracking
leaseTracking.description: Monitor lease terms, renewal dates, and rental agreements with automated reminders.

paymentTracking.title: Payment Tracking
paymentTracking.description: Track rent payments, late fees, and generate financial reports with our integrated system.

maintenanceRequests.title: Maintenance Requests
maintenanceRequests.description: Handle maintenance requests efficiently with our ticketing system and vendor management.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Get insights into your property performance with detailed analytics and custom reports.

about.title: Why Choose Tanaka?
about.description: We understand the challenges of property management in Tanzania. That's why we've built a platform specifically designed for local needs.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied property managers and owners

testimonial1.text: Tanaka has revolutionized how I manage my rental properties. Everything is so much easier now!

testimonial2.text: The best property management platform I've used. Saves me hours every week.

testimonial3.text: Outstanding features and excellent customer support. Highly recommended!
